text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack: When you have a sovereign nation like Iran that is supporting a militia, you cannot get rid of that militia by killing them. It's the same philosophy in each country. You need to start with prosperity, from the individual to the family, to the tribe, to the community. And this is why, in my humble opinion—and I think the president, my boss's opinion—is left to the region: the Abraham Accords eventually is the answer. And Syria is an experiment alongside Türkiye, which is allowing them to do it. Türkiye, which happens to be the only real economy in the middle of this very complicated region, is a real nation.
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克：当你拥有像伊朗这样的主权国家支持民兵组织时，你无法通过消灭他们来消除该民兵组织。每个国家的哲学都是一样的。你需要从繁荣开始，从个人到家庭，到部落，再到社区。这就是为什么，以我的拙见——我认为总统，也就是我的老板的观点——留给该地区：亚伯拉罕协议最终是答案。叙利亚是与土耳其并行的实验，土耳其允许他们这样做。土耳其恰好是这个非常复杂的地区中唯一的真正经济体，是一个真正的国家。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Pressure to end or limit enrichment aims to strip Iran of deterrence, leaving it vulnerable to future war and fragmentation — Ebrahim Rezaei, spokesperson for Iran's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗国家安全与外交政策委员会发言人易卜拉欣·雷扎伊表示，结束或限制浓缩活动的压力旨在剥夺伊朗的威慑力，使其在未来的战争和分裂中变得脆弱。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF arrested over 70 suspects and seized weapons and terror funds across Judea and Samaria over the past week. Operations targeted Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad operatives. Forces confiscated M16 and M4 rifles, pistols, improvised firearms, ammunition, drones, and over 100,000 shekels in terror financing linked to Hamas. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：过去一周，以色列国防军在犹大和撒马利亚逮捕了70多名嫌疑人，并查获了武器和恐怖资金。行动针对哈马斯和巴勒斯坦伊斯兰圣战组织的成员。部队没收了M16和M4步枪、手枪、简易枪支、弹药、无人机以及超过10万谢克尔与哈马斯有关的恐怖融资。推文

text: Open Source Intel A friend shared an interesting take on the Lebanon ceasefire. A little bit of cope, but maybe a possible option: Maybe Netanyahu wanted a short pause anyway. Independence Day is approaching and Israelis could use a moment to breathe. Announcing it himself would mean taking the political hit. So Trump makes the announcement. Netanyahu steps back and signals that after all the help the administration has done for Israel, refusing is not an option. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一位朋友分享了关于黎巴嫩停火的有趣看法。虽然有点自我安慰，但也许是一个可能的选择：也许内塔尼亚胡本来就想要一个短暂的停顿。独立日临近，以色列人需要喘口气。由他自己宣布意味着要承担政治打击。所以特朗普宣布了。内塔尼亚胡退后一步，暗示在政府为以色列提供了所有帮助之后，拒绝是不可能的。推文

text: Nuno Felix Russian appeasers talk a big game but fail to understand that you can tackle migrant flows and support a European country against the enemy who seeks to destroy our civilization I will always push back against anyone who tries to handcuff the remigration issue to any other question, be it geopolitical, economic, or ideological. Those people tend to start a purity spiral and exclude everyone who does not support their country of choice in a foreign war, or their preferred economic or ideological system, or their preferred answer to the decay of modernity from a broader remigration movement. They focus their destructive energy not on the real opponent, but on other right-wingers. They claim that only once the right is “purified” of “traitors” and “deviants” can it be successful. The opposite is true. We need to form a broad coalition around the most important issue: our ethnocultural existence and continuity. If you agree with this, you are in. But on board of the remigration train, you need to accept certain rules of decency and comradeship. Dissens is ok. Discussions are important. If you want to kick others out and call them traitors because they don’t agree with you on a certain issue, or don’t want to talk about a certain subject, then you should probably leave yourself. You are becoming a tool of the anti-remigration movement splintering and distracting our coalition. - Martin Sellner tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯：俄罗斯的绥靖者们说得头头是道，却不明白你可以既应对移民潮，又支持一个欧洲国家对抗试图摧毁我们文明的敌人。我将永远反对任何试图将再移民问题与其他任何问题（无论是地缘政治、经济还是意识形态）挂钩的人。这些人往往会陷入纯洁性螺旋，排斥所有不支持他们在外国战争中选择的国家、或他们偏好的经济或意识形态体系、或他们对现代性衰落的偏好答案的人，从而将其排除在更广泛的再移民运动之外。他们将破坏性能量集中在其他右翼人士身上，而不是真正的对手身上。他们声称，只有当右翼被“净化”了“叛徒”和“变节者”之后，才能取得成功。事实恰恰相反。我们需要围绕最重要的问题建立广泛的联盟：我们的民族文化存在和延续。如果你同意这一点，你就加入了。但在再移民的列车上，你需要接受一定的体面和同志情谊规则。异议是可以的。讨论很重要。如果你想把别人踢出去并称他们为叛徒，仅仅因为他们在某个问题上与你意见不一致，或者不想谈论某个话题，那么你可能应该自己离开。你正在成为反再移民运动的工具，分裂并分散了我们联盟的注意力。——马丁·塞尔纳 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇸🇪 🇷🇺 Sweden is preparing for the possibility that Russia could seize one of the Baltic Sea islands at any moment to test NATO’s response, The Times reports. 🔹 According to the armed forces chief, the Kremlin could carry out a limited naval operation as early as tomorrow to expose divisions within the alliance, particularly amid uncertainty linked to Trump’s statements. 🔹 “There are around 400,000 islands in the Baltic Sea, so the question is simply which one Russia might choose. Almost any of them would be enough to challenge the alliance. It wouldn’t need to be a large-scale operation — more of a symbolic move to assess the political reaction,” he said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇸🇪 🇷🇺 据《泰晤士报》报道，瑞典正在为俄罗斯可能随时占领波罗的海岛屿之一以测试北约反应的可能性做准备。🔹 据武装部队总参谋长称，克里姆林宫最早可能在明天进行有限的海军行动，以暴露联盟内部的分歧，特别是在与特朗普言论相关的不确定性背景下。🔹 “波罗的海大约有40万个岛屿，所以问题仅仅是俄罗斯可能会选择哪一个。几乎任何一个岛屿都足以挑战该联盟。这不需要大规模的行动——更多的是一种评估政治反应的象征性举动，”他说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @christogrozev : More and more often, Putin gets directly and publicly blamed for Russia's collapsing economy. Something that was both unthinkable and very predictable only a year ago. https://www.facebook.com/share/v/1Ak2fKUm4m/ tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @Mike_Eckel : Russian Central Bank chair Elvira Nabiullina gave a bit of a response a day after being dinged by Putin. She criticized those who blamed the bank's tight monetary policy and said "for the first time in modern history, our economy is colliding with labor shortages, restrictions." https://twitter.com/Mike_Eckel/status/2044772703131902373/video/1 "And this was a blow aimed squarely at those seated in the room. They were the very ones who presented their forecasts to the Supreme Commander, not long ago, at the end of 2025." @kommersant https://www.kommersant.ru/doc/8590107 - Mike Eckel tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯 RT @Mike_Eckel : 俄罗斯央行行长埃尔薇拉·纳比乌琳娜在被普京批评一天后做出了一些回应。她批评了那些指责央行紧缩货币政策的人，并表示“现代历史上第一次，我们的经济正与劳动力短缺、限制相碰撞。” https://twitter.com/Mike_Eckel/status/2044772703131902373/video/1 “而这一打击直接针对的是坐在房间里的人。他们正是不久前，在2025年底，向最高统帅提交预测的人。” @kommersant https://www.kommersant.ru/doc/8590107 - Mike Eckel 推文

He said U.S. destroyers are heavily armed, while Washington moves to widen the blockade as pressure mounts on Tehran’s economy and nuclear program. @JesseBWatters tweet

text: 🇺🇸 Sailors injured after fire breaks out on aircraft carrier USS Eisenhower during shipyard maintenance at Norfolk Naval Shipyard in Portsmouth, Virginia — Fox News. It is unclear where the fire originated, as the Navy said the fire remains under investigation.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 弗吉尼亚州朴茨茅斯诺福克海军造船厂的艾森豪威尔号航空母舰在船厂维护期间发生火灾，导致水手受伤——福克斯新闻。目前尚不清楚火灾的起因，海军表示火灾仍在调查中。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 AP: Philippine forces killed 10 suspected Muslim militants, including members of Dawlah Islamiya-Maute, in a gunbattle in Lanao del Sur during an operation to serve arrest warrants on a wanted commander. Authorities said the group opened fire first, with no government casualties reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 美联社：菲律宾军队在南拉瑙省的一次行动中，在执行对一名通缉指挥官的逮捕令时，与包括达瓦拉伊斯兰教-毛特组织成员在内的疑似穆斯林武装分子发生枪战，击毙了10人。当局表示该组织首先开火，没有政府人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇼 Focus Taiwan: Police in Taiwan said a tracking device was found on KMT Vice Chair Li Chien-lung’s vehicle. Investigators recovered fingerprints and serial data from the device as they continue probing possible stalking activity. Li denied any political link to the device, while figures from both major parties called for clarification amid conflicting accounts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇼 中央社：台湾警方表示，在国民党副主席李乾龙的座车上发现了一个追踪器。调查人员已从该设备中提取了指纹和序列号数据，并继续调查可能的跟踪行为。李乾龙否认该设备与政治有关，而两大政党的成员在各方说法不一的情况下，均呼吁对此事进行澄清。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Meet the Dagmaq family. A Hezbollah-linked grandmother is back in focus. text: Israel Appoints Envoy to a Breakaway No Other Country Recognizes Israel has appointed Micheal Lotum as its first ambassador to Somaliland, a breakaway region no other country recognizes, deepening controversial ties after becoming the first state to acknowledge its independence months ago with plans of a military base in the horn. text_zh: 以色列任命驻一个没有其他国家承认的分离地区特使 以色列已任命迈克尔·洛图姆为驻索马里兰的首任大使，这是一个没有其他国家承认的分离地区。在几个月前成为第一个承认其独立的国家并计划在非洲之角建立军事基地后，此举加深了双方充满争议的关系。阅读更多

text: 🌟 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Israeli radio: A senior Israeli official admits that Iran played a role in the ceasefire in Lebanon, meaning that reaching a ceasefire is not separate from Iran's demands in negotiations with the US.

text: 🇺🇦 💬 As a result of the strikes on energy facilities, power outages occurred in parts of the Dnepropetrovsk, Zhitomir, Odessa, Chernigov, Kharkov, Zaporozhye, and Donetsk regions, according to the Ukrainian Ministry of Energy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Over the last 2 years, one Lebanese woman from the Dadmaq family lost her brother, two sons, two grandsons, a nephew, two cousins, and an uncle, all Hezbollah members. Other relatives are still fighting. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045033662660440308/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 在过去两年中，一名来自 Dadmaq 家族的黎巴嫩妇女失去了她的兄弟、两个儿子、两个孙子、一个侄子、两个堂兄弟和一个叔叔，他们都是真主党成员。其他亲属仍在战斗。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045033662660440308/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah held celebrations marking the return of residents to Nabatieh in southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045031475666371021/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党举行了庆祝活动，纪念居民返回黎巴嫩南部的纳巴泰。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045031475666371021/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Southern Lebanon residents received calls from the IDF tonight warning them not to return to their homes. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045027202312307038/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩南部居民今晚接到了以色列国防军的电话，警告他们不要返回家园。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045027202312307038/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇧🇪 🇳🇱 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 French Defence Minister Catherine Vautrin said Belgium, the Netherlands, and France have mine-clearance capabilities that could be used to help secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz. She said France and Britain will co-chair a meeting of about 40 countries in Paris to discuss restoring freedom of navigation in the strait, which carries around 20% of global oil and LNG flows. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇧🇪 🇳🇱 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 法国国防部长凯瑟琳·沃特兰表示，比利时、荷兰和法国拥有可用于帮助确保霍尔木兹海峡通行安全的扫雷能力。她说，法国和英国将在巴黎共同主持一场约40个国家参加的会议，讨论恢复该海峡的航行自由，该海峡承担了全球约20%的石油和液化天然气运输量。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Dnepropetrovsk is under a big attack today 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克今天遭到大规模袭击 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "This may be a historic day. I hope Hezbollah behaves well." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045025812970181063/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Trump：“这可能是历史性的一天。我希望真主党表现良好。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045025812970181063/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Pakistani security source told Reuters that a deal between the U.S. and Iran is close, with talks already in the final stage. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 一位巴基斯坦安全消息人士告诉路透社，美国和伊朗之间的协议已接近达成，谈判已进入最后阶段。 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. intelligence agencies assessed that China considered supplying Iran with radars and SAM systems early in the war. Reports also indicate Iran has been using Chinese satellite imagery during the conflict. - CBS tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国情报机构评估认为，中国在战争初期曾考虑向伊朗提供雷达和地对空导弹系统。报告还指出，伊朗在冲突期间一直使用中国的卫星图像。 - CBS 推文

text: WarMonitor A nationwide arrest warrant was issued for an ICE agent in MN who's charged with 2 counts of felony assault. DA Mary Moriarty says she's also investigating several other cases, including the killings of Renee Good, Alex Pretti, and the shooting of Julio Cesar Sosa‑Celis. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045023125964767545/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 明尼苏达州对一名美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）特工发出了全国通缉令，该特工被控两项重罪袭击罪。地方检察官玛丽·莫里亚蒂（Mary Moriarty）表示，她还在调查其他几起案件，包括蕾妮·古德（Renee Good）、亚历克斯·普雷蒂（Alex Pretti）的遇害案以及胡里奥·塞萨尔·索萨-塞利斯（Julio Cesar Sosa‑Celis）的枪击案。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2045023125964767545/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender BLKCAT6, a U.S. Navy MQ-4C “Triton” High-Altitude Surveillance Drone flew an over 12-hour mission yesterday off the coast of Cuba, flying rounds over the Gulf of America and Northern Caribbean, taking a particularly close look at both Havana and the area near Guantanamo Bay, before returning to Naval Air Station Jacksonville in Florida. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender BLKCAT6，一架美国海军MQ-4C“海神”高空监视无人机昨天在古巴海岸外执行了超过12小时的任务，在美国墨西哥湾和加勒比海北部上空盘旋，特别密切关注了哈瓦那和关塔那摩湾附近的区域，随后返回佛罗里达州的杰克逊维尔海军航空站。 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 CENTCOM Commander General Brad Cooper: 📌 “We are rearming, modernizing our equipment, and adjusting our tactics, methods, and procedures. There is no other military in the world that adapts the way we do — and that’s exactly what we are doing now during the ceasefire period.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Brad Cooper）将军：📌 “我们正在重新武装、实现装备现代化，并调整我们的战术、方法和程序。世界上没有其他军队能像我们这样适应——而这正是我们在停火期间正在做的事情。” 与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇴🇲 🇮🇷 Omani Foreign Ministry said it facilitated the return of Omani citizens from Iran through coordinated land and air arrangements via Tehran and Ankara, in coordination with Omani embassies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇴🇲 🇮🇷 阿曼外交部表示，在阿曼驻外使馆的协调下，通过德黑兰和安卡拉的陆路和空路协调安排，促成了阿曼公民从伊朗返回。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇲🇲 Myanmar has reduced imprisoned ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi’s sentence by one-sixth, her lawyer told Reuters. Suu Kyi, 80, has been serving a 27-year sentence on multiple convictions including corruption, incitement, election fraud, and violating a state secrets law. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇲🇲 据路透社报道，缅甸已将其被监禁的前领导人昂山素季的刑期减免了六分之一。80岁的昂山素季因腐败、煽动、选举舞弊和违反国家机密法等多项罪名被判处27年监禁。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical US intelligence agencies assessed that China had weighed supplying Iran with radars and SAM systems early in the war -US officials to CBS Reports also indicated that Iran was using satellite imagery obtained from China during the current conflict. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国情报机构评估认为，中国曾在战争初期考虑向伊朗提供雷达和地对空导弹系统——美国官员向哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）报道透露，伊朗在当前冲突中使用了从中国获得的卫星图像。 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton drone has been operating around Cuba for several hours and is currently circling off the coast of Havana. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045015153398165649/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 一架美国海军MQ-4C“海神”无人机已在古巴周边执行任务数小时，目前正在哈瓦那海岸外盘旋。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045015153398165649/video/1 tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 French President Macron on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire: I fully support the ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel as announced by President Trump yesterday. I also express my concern that it may already be undermined by the continuation of military operations. I call for the safety of civilian populations on both sides of the border between Lebanon and Israel. Hezbollah must renounce its weapons. Israel must respect Lebanese sovereignty and stop the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 法国总统马克龙就以色列与真主党停火发表声明：我完全支持特朗普总统昨天宣布的以色列与真主党之间的停火协议。同时，我对军事行动的持续可能已经破坏该协议表示担忧。我呼吁保障黎巴嫩和以色列边境两侧平民的安全。真主党必须放弃武器。以色列必须尊重黎巴嫩主权并停止战争。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Reuters: Oil tankers are avoiding the Strait of Hormuz due to a US blockade set to begin on Monday, following failed peace talks between the US and Iran. Pakistan-flagged vessels Shalamar and Khairpur entered the Gulf, with Shalamar heading to the…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Pakistani-flagged tanker Shalamar exited the Strait of Hormuz carrying crude loaded from the UAE. The vessel is heading to Karachi with about 440,000 barrels of Abu Dhabi’s Das Blend crude. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 路透社：由于美伊和平谈判破裂，美国将于周一开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡，油轮纷纷避开该航道。巴基斯坦籍油轮‘沙拉马尔’号（Shalamar）和‘海尔普尔’号（Khairpur）已进入海湾，其中‘沙拉马尔’号正驶向……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦籍油轮“沙拉马尔”号已离开霍尔木兹海峡，船上装载着从阿联酋运出的原油。该船正驶往卡拉奇，载有约44万桶阿布扎比的Das Blend原油。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇪 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Reuters: Estonia’s defence minister Hanno Pevkur said he trusts the United States to defend NATO allies if Russia attacks and rejected concerns the alliance could collapse. He said Europe is not yet ready to defend itself alone and urged increased defence spending across NATO members. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇪 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 路透社：爱沙尼亚国防部长汉诺·佩夫库尔表示，他相信美国会在俄罗斯发动袭击时保卫北约盟国，并驳斥了有关该联盟可能崩溃的担忧。他表示，欧洲尚未准备好独自进行防御，并敦促北约成员国增加国防开支。 @wfwitness
